blended.narrative: Keystone is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 10,097 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 48°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 37".
